title: Don't Admit Defeat Even If You're Dead! A Delinquent in Denji Heian-kyo!
overview: After an accident, teenage delinquent Takeru wakes up to find the literal girl of his dreams standing there.

title: You Can't Build Trust with Words! This Delinquent Will Be an Onmyoji
overview: Takeru wakes up in Denji Heian-kyo again, but nobody remembers him or believes his stories about fighting oni.

title: Don't Just Focus on What You Can See! Yura's Wavering Feelings
overview: When Takeru proves to be a good battle partner for Atsunaga, Yura has some difficult decisions to make.

title: Don't Get Used to Being Alone! Takeru's First Centennial Pandemonium!
overview: Seimei plans to put Takeru's explosive but unpredictable power to use in the upcoming Centennial Pandemonium.

title: Come On Down, Once-in-a-Millennium Me! The Yasha Mask That Guides Takeru
overview: After the trauma of losing a Centennial Pandemonium fight, Takeru becomes afraid to enter the black mist.

title: This Time I'll Protect You! What Appeared Beyond the Centennial Pandemonium
overview: Takeru's power reaches all new heights, but revelations await him during the next Centennial Pandemonium.

title: Say It Ain't So! The Truth About Denji Heian-kyo Is Revealed
overview: Seimei explains to Takeru the shocking truth regarding how things work in Denji Heian-kyo.

title: Don't Screw Around with People Desperately Trying to Get By! The Wailing of Seiryu Tower
overview: Takeru decides to aid Tsukimiya in thwarting Seimei's World Whittle. Their first stop, Seiryu Tower.

title: Fight Me for Real! Takeru vs. Seimei, Souls Going Mano a Mano
overview: As Takeru destroys the Towers of the Four Gods one by one, Seimei chooses to personally face him in combat.

title: Change the Future on Your Own! Seimei, Across a Thousand Years
overview: Seimei tells Takeru of the events from a thousand years ago that led him to begin the World Whittle.

title: Get Ready, Hareaki! Final Showdown in Denji Heian-kyo!!
overview: Tsukimiya makes a power play in the final Denji Heian-kyo, and Takeru must team up with Seimei to stop her.

title: Don't Give Up on the Future! I'll Seize the Possibility I've Long Desired
overview: Seimei deduces the true nature of Takeru's powers, and how they are the key for unlocking the future.
